items.name: Pointe Shoes 3.0 - Bright Pink
items.description: Pointe shoes are specialized ballet shoes designed for dancers to perform on the tips of their toes. They have a reinforced toe box, stiff sole, and ribbons to support the dancer's feet, enabling graceful movements and intricate ballet techniques.

It's great for any of the coolest and most awsome gamer outfits that want that diamonds glow . Whether you're dressing emo / scene / goth / punk / or Y2K / retro -- wear this epic and icy necklace . The ice part of this necklace is white and looks like a crystal / pearl gem .
